title: Auto Welcomer
description: A simple mod that automatically welcomes players when they join with a custom message
body:
# AutoWelcome Mod

A Minecraft Fabric mod that automatically welcomes players when they join the server.

## Features

- Automatically sends a customizable welcome message to players when they join
- Configure welcome delay in ticks
- Option to ignore yourself when joining
- Simple command interface for all settings

## Commands

All commands start with `/autowelcome`:

- `/autowelcome` - Shows current status
- `/autowelcome on` - Enables automatic welcome messages
- `/autowelcome off` - Disables automatic welcome messages
- `/autowelcome toggle` - Toggles between enabled and disabled states
- `/autowelcome delay` - Shows current delay in ticks
- `/autowelcome delay <ticks>` - Sets the delay before sending welcome messages (0-200 ticks)
- `/autowelcome message` - Shows current welcome message
- `/autowelcome message <text>` - Sets a new welcome message
- `/autowelcome ignore on` - Stops welcoming yourself when you join
- `/autowelcome ignore off` - Enables welcoming yourself when you join
- `/autowelcome welcomeall` - Sends welcome messages to all currently online players
- `/autowelcome status` - Displays all current settings

## Installation

1. Install [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/) for your Minecraft version
2. Download the latest AutoWelcome mod JAR from the releases page
3. Place the JAR file in your Minecraft `mods` folder
4. Launch Minecraft with Fabric

## Configuration

Settings are saved automatically when changed through commands.
